cards.title: Search and supply
cards.body: Understand how eligible hotel inventory and offers can be discovered by approved platform paths.

cards.title: Booking and payment
cards.body: Connect selected inventory to a booking path, payment logic, and confirmation flow.

cards.title: Webhook and attribution
cards.body: Carry source, Partner, booking, cancellation, and reporting events back into the platform workflow.

items.question: What are Wink Docs for?
items.answer: Wink Docs are for developers and platform teams that need to understand hotel commerce integration concepts before implementation.

items.question: Are endpoint references included?
items.answer: This launch route explains the integration surfaces. Endpoint references, SDK samples, and sandbox access should be added once approved.

items.question: How do developers request access?
items.answer: Developers can request API access through the contact route or request a demo when the commercial use case needs discussion first.

fields.heading: Ready to build with Wink?
fields.body: Start with the route that matches your team, then move into a focused demo or sign-up flow.
